title: The Villager Player Mix
description: This 1.21+ resource pack turns you into a weird villager player mix
body:
# This resource pack turns you into a Villager Player mix.

This resource pack **Requries** [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

Optifine does not support Player Models Yet.
